latest.brief: The Initia ecosystem is running normally across its interconnected rollup network. Multiple minitias are processing transactions and producing blocks at consistent rates. Cross-rollup IBC channels remain active.

history.brief: The Initia ecosystem is running normally across its interconnected rollup network. Multiple minitias are processing transactions and producing blocks at consistent rates. Cross-rollup IBC channels remain active.
Thriving ecosystem — 3 new IBC channels established, cross-rollup activity surging
Network performance strong — block times stable at 1.2s avg across rollups
Steady growth phase — validator set expanded, governance proposals active
Rollup activity increasing — new minitia onboarded, IBC transfer volume up 12%
Initia ecosystem thriving — 42 rollups active, IBC channels growing steadily
